name: Country Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 to 5 cups sliced fresh mushrooms (about 1 pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, melt butter; stir in flour until smooth.
2. Gradually stir in broth until smooth. Add salt, pepper, and bay leaves.
3. Simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Meanwhile, in another saucepan, sauté the celery and onion in oil until tender.
5. Add mushrooms; cook and stir until tender. Add to broth mixture.
6. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered for 15 more minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Add cream; heat through. Discard bay leaves.
Makes 4 servings.
